qa_pairs.question: Which VASP EasyBuild recipes include the ELPA library?
qa_pairs.answer: The VASP-6.5.0-iimpi-2023a.eb and VASP-6.5.1-iimpi-2023a.eb EasyBuild recipes include the ELPA library.

qa_pairs.question: What libraries are included in the VASP-6.5.1-iimpi-2023a.eb EasyBuild recipe?
qa_pairs.answer: The VASP-6.5.1-iimpi-2023a.eb EasyBuild recipe includes Wannier Function, Beef, HDF5, LibXC, ELPA, Libmbd, and dft4.

qa_pairs.question: Which VASP EasyBuild recipes include the dft4 library?
qa_pairs.answer: The VASP-6.4.3-iimpi-2023a.eb, VASP-6.5.0-iimpi-2023a.eb, and VASP-6.5.1-iimpi-2023a.eb EasyBuild recipes include the dft4 library.
